issues.description: Action type is 'Rest' but card text says 'set this Character as active'. 'Active' means the opposite of resting. Should be a custom action or the DSL needs to support 'Activate' (unrest). 'Rest' is incorrect.

Trigger is 'OnKO' but card text specifies 'When this Character battles and K.O.'s' – this requires the Character to be attacking and deal the K.O. blow. 'OnKO' is too broad; should be 'OnAttack' with a condition that the attacked character was K.O.'d, or a more specific 'OnBattleKO' trigger if available.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [DON!! x1] [Once Per Turn] When this Character battles and K.O.'s your opponent's Character, set this Character as active.
